protocol.name: blur
protocol.copyright:
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2015 Martin Gräßlin SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2015 Marco Martin
SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-2.1-or-later

request.name: unset
request.description:
Removes the blur effect. The change will take effect after wl_surface.commit.
Since version 2, this request is deprecated in favor of org_kde_kwin_blur.release.

request.name: release
request.description: Removes the blur effect. The change will take effect after wl_surface.commit.
